title: sorghum pratense
intro: Sorghum pratense, also known as broom sorghum, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Sorghum pratense can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
